zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Gorges於大約1205年出生在英國時，他的父親Gorges22歲，母親Joan22歲。他於1253年8月18日與Eleanor de Morville在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1272年12月8日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Gorges于大约1205年出生在英国时，他的父亲Gorges22岁，母亲Joan22岁。他于1253年8月18日与Eleanor de Morville在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1272年12月8日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Gorges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Erwin, Heinz, Otto, Wilhelm.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of various places in France named with Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (see Gorge 2).

variants.name: Gorge
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in a deep valley, from Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (from Old French gorge ‘throat’), or a habitational name from any of various places in France named with this word.
English: variant of   Gorges   2 or   George  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Gorges was born about 1205, in England, his father, Gorges, was 22 and his mother, Joan, was 22. He married Eleanor de Morville on 18 August 1253, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 8 December 1272, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Gorges est né environ 1205, à Angleterre, son père, Gorges, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Morville le 18 août 1253, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 8 décembre 1272, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Gorges um 1205 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gorges 22 und seine Mutter Joan 22. Er hat am 18. August 1253 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Eleanor de Morville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 8. Dezember 1272 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Gorges è nato il circa 1205 nel England, il suo padre, Gorges, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Morville il 18 agosto 1253, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 8 dicembre 1272, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Gorgesが約1205年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Gorgesは22歳，母Joanは22歳であった。1253年8月18日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでEleanor de Morvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1272年12月8日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Gorges(이)가 대략 1205년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gorges(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1253년 8월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Eleanor de Morville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 12월 8일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Gorges nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Gorges, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Morville em 18 de agosto de 1253, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 8 de dezembro de 1272, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Gorges родился около 1205 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Gorges было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Morville 18 августа 1253 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 8 декабрь 1272 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Gorges nació aproximadamente 1205, en Inglaterra, su papá, Gorges, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Morville el 18 de agosto de 1253, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 8 de diciembre de 1272, en su pueblo.
